ops.body: ship now stamps a Claude-Session-Id trailer: when CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID is set, ccx vcs ship appends '\n\nClaude-Session-Id: <id>' to any -m message (jj + git paths, incl. amend-with-message; no-message amends untouched). Implemented in internal/cli/ship.go (withSessionTrailer, applied in shipCommit) — currently uncommitted in the shared working copy. Fold a mention into the README ship line when doing this task.
